This location is near end of track of low end EF1 tornado with winds around 90 mph. The tornado skipped along the path and uprooted or snapped trees along the path starting from Old Steubenville Pike near intersection of Highway 22 and Potato Garden road. Other tree damage was noted along Seabridge Road and Kelso Road. Additional details about path width and length will come later.
Lots of tree damage along a 1/2 mile path. Likely tornado (low confidence TDS was noted on radar). Power pole also snapped. Time estimated using radar.

A brief tornado began near the Mellon Plan neighborhood of Monroeville and swept through parts of Wall, Pitcairn and south Monroeville. Damage noted included a large number of trees snapped or uprooted, some fence damage, with siding removed from homes. Trees fell into power lines, causing a number of poles to snap. The tornado briefly retreated north toward Kelvington Park before dissipating.
Trees down on Mosside Boulevard near Signal Hill Drive. Likely tornado (this was along path of velocity couplet just prior to TDS formation). Time estimated from radar.
Report from mPING: 3-inch tree limbs broken; Power poles broken. Time estimated from radar. Likely a tornado.
Report from mPING: 3-inch tree limbs broken; Power poles broken. Likely a tornado, time estimated from radar.

Radar confirmed Tornado Debris Signature (TDS) with CC dropout to 0.865 and strong velocity couplet.

Trees down. Reported as wind damage, but almost certainly a tornado based on TDS observed on radar in this area. Time estimated based on radar.

Storm survey confirms tornado damage in a swath just south of US Highway 22 from south of Delmont to southwest of Shieldsburg and New Alexandria. Details on the path length and path width will come at a later time. This was a lower end strong tornado (EF2) with winds to about 115 mph. Numerous very large trees snapped or uprooted and power poles down along Jobes road between Beaver Run Road and Boggs Hollow Road. Difficult to access all areas due to road closures from debris.
